'''Grodo''' was the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] physician of [[Aruk Besadii Aora]] and he had advised the elderly crimelord to keep better care of himself by exercising and eating nutritiously. Unfortunately, Aruk had been poisoned by [[Teroenza]] acting under orders from [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] and [[Jiliac Desilijic Tiron|Jiliac]]. When Aruk died, Grodo could find nothing incriminating in the old Hutt's corpse that suggested foul play.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{1st}}
